name: typing-and-presence
title: Typing and Presence
description: A combined real-time typing + participant-presence strip for messaging/collaboration — presence (online/active/idle/away/offline/reconnecting) + typing (typing/recording/uploading/editing) by shape+text, avatar initials, overflow summary ("Three people are typing"), compact/inline/floating modes. App supplies all data; a debounced polite live region avoids keystroke spam; ambient motion pauses when hidden.
